name: Pack Of 24  - King Canned Dog Food - Lamb Chunks in Gravy 400g
description: Provide your adult dog with a delicious and nutritious meal with King Canned Dog Food Lamb Chunks in Gravy 400g . Made with real lamb (4% in the chunks), high-quality cereals, and essential minerals, this complementary pet food delivers a tasty and wholesome addition to your dog’s diet. Key Benefits: Meaty chunks in savory gravy that dogs love Balanced nutrition with protein, fat, and essential minerals Moisture-rich formula (83%) to support hydration Easy to serve and digest Analytical Constituents: Crude Protein: 7% Crude Fat: 5% Crude Fibre: 0.5% Crude Ash: 2.5% Moisture: 83% Feeding Directions: Serve at room temperature. Always provide clean, fresh drinking water. Once opened, cover, refrigerate, and use within 2 days. Not suitable for human consumption. Storage & Expiry: Check the bottom of the can for the best before date and batch number.
